examples.english: and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.

senses.gloss: to give water to, to quench the thirst of, to hydrate

examples.text: وَفِي ٱلْأَرْضِ قِطَعٌ مُتَجَاوِرَاتٌ وَجَنَّاتٌ مِنْ أَعْنَابٍ وَزَرْعٌ وَنَخِيلٌ صِنْوَانٌ وَغَيْرُ صِنْوَانٍ يُسْقَى بِمَاءٍ وَاحِدٍ وَنُفَضِّلُ بَعْضَهَا عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ فِي ٱلْأُكُلِ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَاتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يَعْقِلُونَ
examples.english: And within the land are neighboring plots and gardens of grapevines and crops and palm trees, [growing] several from a root or otherwise, watered with one water; and We favor and privilege some of them over the others in eating. Indeed, in that are signs for thinking men.

etymology.text: From the root س ق ي (s q y). Cognate with Hebrew הִשְׁקָה (hishká).
